response.overview: Eileen always had aspirations to leave the reservation she grew up in and move to the big city. Whenever she would bring it up someone would remind her she had it good here. One day that all changed when she impulsively leapt at the chance of making her dream come true. She took off her work apron, said goodbye, and embarked on her new adventure. A dream that had her come face to face with adversity navigating unfamiliar landscapes and individuals with nefarious intentions.
response.title: See the City
